prompt_inputs.goal: Carbohydrate loading for marathon race tomorrow with high caloric intake (3500+ calories)
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no nuts or tree nuts

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 1 day of meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Total daily calories meet or exceed 3500 calories
Carbohydrates comprise at least 65% of total calories for endurance loading
All meals and foods are vegetarian and nut-free as specified
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a elite endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading before a major race event

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gain for weightlifting competition in 8 weeks

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus 1-2 snacks with high protein content (minimum 25g protein per meal)
Includes pre-training and post-training nutrition timing around a typical weightlifting session
Macronutrient distribution supports strength/power goals (approximately 2.2g protein per kg bodyweight daily)
Plan is concise and formatted for a single day only
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals and specific macronutrient timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for a competitive soccer match with kickoff at 3 PM

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers breakfast, pre-match meal, and post-match recovery with appropriate timing relative to 3 PM kickoff
Includes adequate hydration strategy throughout the day with specific fluid recommendations
Balances carbohydrates for sustained energy, protein for recovery, and micronutrients appropriate for a 78 kg athlete
All foods comply with vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport with mixed demands (soccer player) requiring balanced nutrition with emphasis on recovery, hydration, and sustained energy throughout game day
